nodes.title: Save Icon (No Border) - Bypass to disable

groups.title: 5A. No Border Output (256/128/32) + Icons - Uses SaveImageWithAlpha

info.name: brand-badge-generator
info.description: Operator23a brand badge generation with B&W enforcement, edge cleanup, and proper transparency. V8.0 adds ImageDesaturate+ for guaranteed monochrome output.
info.author: the organization

required_custom_nodes: comfyui-rmbg or similar (for BiRefNetRMBG background removal)

usage_notes.toggle_icons: To disable icon generation, right-click SaveAsIcon nodes and select 'Bypass' (Ctrl+B)
usage_notes.toggle_border_branch: To disable entire border branch, Bypass the ImageBorder node
usage_notes.output_folders: PNG outputs go to output/noborder/ and output/border/. ICO/ICNS follow same structure.
usage_notes.border_customization: ImageBorder settings: shape (square/rounded/circle), placement (outside/inside/stroke - stroke preserves transparency), corner_radius (for rounded), border_width (12px default), border_color (hex)
usage_notes.alpha_preservation: All PNG outputs now use SaveImageWithAlpha to preserve transparency

changes_v7.lora_loading: Replaced 5 chained LoraLoader nodes with rgthree Lora Loader Stack (4 slots) + 1 LoraLoader
changes_v7.alpha_preservation: Replaced all SaveImage nodes with SaveImageWithAlpha to fix background reappearing issue
changes_v7.prompts: Updated positive prompt to enforce right-facing direction with looking away, from side, facing right
changes_v7.negative_prompts: Added looking at viewer, facing viewer, facing left, looking left, facing camera to enforce direction

slot_2.name: LineArt Mono Style LoRA_Pony XL v6.safetensors

additional.name: EyeLRslider.safetensors
additional.purpose: Eye gaze direction control (NOT head direction - title was misleading)

changes_v8.b_and_w_enforcement: Added ImageDesaturate+ node (factor=1.0, luminance Rec.709) between VAEDecode and BiRefNetRMBG to guarantee monochrome output regardless of LoRA behavior
changes_v8.eye_lora_fix: Renamed LoRA 5 from non-existent HeadLeft-Right.safetensors to EyeLRslider.safetensors (controls eye gaze direction, NOT head direction) with reduced strength 0.5
changes_v8.edge_artifact_fix: BiRefNetRMBG now uses mask_blur=2 (smooth edges) and mask_offset=-2 (erode by 2px to remove partial transparency artifacts)
changes_v8.refine_foreground: Enabled refine_foreground in BiRefNetRMBG for better edge quality and cleaner cutouts
changes_v8.head_direction_via_prompt: Head direction now controlled purely through prompts (looking away, from side, facing right, three-quarter view) since no head direction LoRA exists
